revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Commonscat|18th-century architecture|18th-century architecture}} [[20世紀]]の[[建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{Catlink|17世紀の建築|19世…」
空調・生活の快適性などが含まれ芸術作品ではありますが、「美術工芸品」ではないです。
Moved [[Category:18th-century works]] to Buildings subcat
1 revision imported
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:47:59
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:18世紀の建築]] [[ab:Category:18-тәи ашәышықәсазтәи архитектура]] [[ar:Category:عمارة القرن 18]] [[az:Category:XVIII əsr memarlığı]] [[be_x_old:Category:Архітэктура XVIII стагодзьдзя]] [[be:Category:Архітэктура XVIII стагоддзя]] [[bn:Category:১৮শ শতাব্দীর স্থাপত্য]] [[bs:Category:Arhitektura u 18. vijeku]] [[ce:Category:XVIII бӀешеран архитектура]] [[commons:Category:18th-century architecture]] [[cy:Category:Pensaernïaeth y 18fed ganrif]] [[de:Category:Erbaut im 18. Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 18ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 18-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVIII]] [[eu:Category:XVIII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:18-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[ko:Category:18세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 18 век]] [[mn:Category:18-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:18e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1700-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVIII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVIII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVIII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 18. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 18. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1700-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 18]] [[tr:Category:18. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVIII століття]] [[ur:Category:اٹھارویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:18世纪建筑]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Edo_period_architecture]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 18ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 18-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVIII]] [[eu:Category:XVIII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:18-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[ko:Category:18세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 18 век]] [[mn:Category:18-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:18e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1700-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVIII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVIII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVIII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 18. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 18. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1700-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 18]] [[tr:Category:18. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVIII століття]] [[ur:Category:اٹھارویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:18世纪建筑]]

revision.text:

[[be_x_old:Category:Архітэктура XVIII стагодзьдзя]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:Edo_period_architecture]]. Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 18ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 18-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVIII]] [[eu:Category:XVIII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:18-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[ko:Category:18세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 18 век]] [[mn:Category:18-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:18e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1700-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVIII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVIII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVIII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 18. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 18. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1700-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 18]] [[tr:Category:18. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVIII століття]] [[ur:Category:اٹھارویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:18世纪建筑]] [[en:Category:18th-century architecture]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

{{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}}

[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]] [[Category:Architecture by century]] [[Category:18th century in the arts|Architecture]] [[Category:2nd-millennium architecture]] [[Category:18th century in art|Architecture]] [[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8122967)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q8122967}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:18th-century architecture]] <!--categories--> [[Category:18th century in art|Architecture]] [[Category:18th century in the arts|Architecture]] [[Category:2nd-millennium architecture]] [[Category:Architecture by century]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th-century_architecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th-century_architecture for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q8122967}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:18th-century architecture]] <!--categories--> [[Category:18th century in art|Architecture]] [[Category:18th century in the arts|Architecture]] [[Category:2nd-millennium architecture]] [[Category:Architecture by century]]
